note: BRAIN layer — signal assignments for enrichment waterfall. East Yorkshire batch (Beverley, Bridlington, Driffield) as planned in 2026-04-03 strategy. HANDS layer reads this to drive website crawl + email-find priority.

leads.signal_text: No website on Google Maps listing — invisible to anyone searching 'builder Beverley' on Google
leads.pain_point: No website found — missing out on online customers
leads.notes: Solid reviews, established trades business. Find email via Companies House or 192.com phone lookup.

leads.signal_text: Site loads over HTTP — Chrome shows 'Not Secure' warning — trust-killer for a food business where new customers check you out before visiting
leads.pain_point: Website lacks SSL certificate — browsers show 'Not Secure' warning
leads.notes: Owner name known (Pete). Seafront trade — high tourist footfall means Google trust is crucial. SSL angle strong for food/hospitality.

leads.signal_text: Website fails mobile test — most 'garden centre near me' searches happen on mobile in spring. Only 22 reviews at 3.6★ compounds the credibility gap.
leads.pain_point: Website not mobile-friendly — losing mobile visitors
leads.notes: Spring is peak for garden centres — timing is ideal. BAB: before (losing mobile visitors in the busiest season), after (capturing them).

leads.signal_text: 4.9★ with 78 reviews — exceptional trust signals going completely unamplified with zero social media presence
leads.pain_point: No social media presence detected — existing reputation not being amplified online
leads.notes: Top-tier lead. Homecare is highly trust-dependent — reputation amplification is a direct business argument. Owner name known. Try linda@holdernessHomecare.co.uk.

leads.signal_text: HTTP site that fails mobile test — property lettings site asking prospective tenants to enter personal details into a non-secure page
leads.pain_point: Website lacks SSL certificate — browsers show 'Not Secure' warning
leads.notes: Lettings agencies collect personal data from site visitors. SSL failure is compliance risk, not just trust issue. Strong PAS hook.

leads.signal_text: Facebook presence but no website — no way to show menus, take bookings, or rank in Google for 'pub Driffield'
leads.pain_point: No website found — social media presence not converting to bookings
leads.notes: Has Facebook — same angle as Cobblestone Kitchen (social-to-booking gap). Find email via Facebook page or DM. Pub/hospitality audience responds to concrete examples.

leads.signal_text: Strong 4.7★ rating and 63 reviews — no Instagram or Facebook to show classes, events or facility photos to new members
leads.pain_point: No social media presence detected — existing reputation not being amplified online
leads.notes: Owner name known. Leisure/sports is very visual — Instagram is a natural fit. AIDA: lead with their own reputation, show what a visual feed could do.

leads.signal_text: Electrician website loading over HTTP — Chrome 'Not Secure' warning undercuts the trust a trades contractor needs to win domestic jobs
leads.pain_point: Website lacks SSL certificate — browsers show 'Not Secure' warning
leads.notes: Owner name (Neil) known. Similar profile to lead 46 (Thornfield Electricals) which is our highest-score batch-3 lead. Try neil@eastridingelectrical.co.uk.

enrichment_summary.notes: East Yorkshire batch. Stronger overall than previous — only 1 low-score lead. Timing good: spring season for trades + hospitality.
